no: All the Things Revised by suy (Alejandro Exojo). Collection of independent tweaks: party AI script, rogue backstab changes, proficiency rebalance, and Monk item crit protection. Early version (v0.2.0) — many components are planned but not yet implemented. All components are standalone with no inter-mod dependencies. Not traified (English only).
sum: A comprehensive tweak mod that revises and rebalances various game elements across the Baldur's Gate series.

co.no: Custom party AI script (suy-ai.bcs). Compiles and copies to scripts folder.
Removes the behind-target positioning requirement for backstabs. Extends scripts across all campaigns (BG1/SoD/BG2).

co.n: Rogue's Luck: Improve attacks after stealth/invisibility
co.tp2n: Rogue's Luck: Improve attacks after stealth/invisibility
co.no: Grants attack bonuses after leaving stealth/invisibility. Adds a custom SPLPROT.2DA entry for level-based checks. Extends scripts across all campaigns.

co.n: Worthwhile Proficiency Points: Buff 1st and 4th proficiency point in a weapon
co.tp2n: Worthwhile Proficiency Points: Buff 1st and 4th proficiency point in a weapon
co.no: Modifies WSPECIAL.2DA: 1st proficiency pip gives +1 THAC0 (up from 0), 4th pip gives +5 damage (up from +3). Updates proficiency descriptions in ENGINEST.2DA.

co.n: Make Moonlight Walkers protect against critical hits
co.tp2n: Make Moonlight Walkers protect against critical hits
co.no: Adds crit protection flag to Moonlight Walkers (RSBOOT.ITM) — Sun Soul Monk boots.

co.n: Make Night Walkers protect against critical hits
co.tp2n: Make Night Walkers protect against critical hits
co.no: Adds crit protection flag to Night Walkers (OHRBOOT1.ITM) — SoD Monk boots.

co.n: Make Monk gauntlets protect against critical hits
co.tp2n: Make Monk gauntlets protect against critical hits
co.no: Adds crit protection to 5 Monk gauntlets: Bracers of the Shuttered Lid, Gauntlets of Perseverance, Gauntlets of Crushing, Tzu-Zan's Bracers, Gauntlets of Aln Zekk.

co.n: Make Monk headbands protect against critical hits
co.tp2n: Make Monk headbands protect against critical hits
co.no: Adds crit protection to 2 Monk headbands: Headband of Focus (SoD), Headband of the Devout (SoD).
